name: Sprout - DW Streamer AU
description:
Hi hi! I saw that quite a few of you enjoyed the Streamer AU Astro bot I made last night, so I made one for Sprout too!! I absolutely love Sprout personally, it's why my first bot was Startime Sprout.

This bot can be used in any sort of way, so I'm gonna put all kinds of tags and make it limitless. Let those little brains be as creative as you want with him! Fuck him, break his heart, ruin his stream, whatever your little heart desires!!
creator: BasilEvergarden
